title: Tragacantha guldenstaedtiae
intro: Tragacantha guldenstaedtiae, also known as Astragalus membranaceus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant and antiviral activities, making it a popular remedy for colds, fever, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha guldenstaedtiae include isoflavones, flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are extracts, capsules, and teas, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote health and well-being.
